basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 336 Anganwadi Worker Posts in Unnao District
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Programme Officer (ICDS), Unnao, Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Merit (Intermediate/Graduation/Post-Graduation marks) and category-wise priority order
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Programme Officer (DPO), Unnao, Uttar Pradesh has released a recruitment notice inviting online applications for 336 vacant posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri (Anganwadi Worker) under the Child Development Project running in Unnao district. The recruitment is being conducted through direct selection as per the government order dated 17 September 2025 governing the selection of Anganwadi Karyakartris/Sahayikas, and is open only to female candidates.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years; Maximum age: 35 years (as on cut-off date 1 July 2026) Only the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid

qualification.details: criteria: Details | gender: Only female candidates are eligible | merit determination: Based on marks obtained in Intermediate, Graduation, and Post-Graduation | residence: Must be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward (urban area) as the vacant post applied for

selection_process: Merit will be determined based on marks obtained in Intermediate
and Post-Graduation. Within eligible candidates from the same Gram Sabha/Ward
priority for selection will follow this order:
Widow BPL candidate Divorced/deserted BPL candidate BPL candidate Widow APL candidate Divorced/deserted APL candidate APL candidate
a legal order issued by a competent court will be valid. For widow candidates
only a certified copy of the death certificate and family register issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned municipal body will be valid.
how_to_apply: Ensure you fulfil the eligibility criteria for gender, age, qualification, and residence before applying.
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and residence details for the relevant Gram Sabha/Ward vacancy.
Upload self-attested, clean and legible copies of the required documents as mentioned in the application.
Review all details carefully before submission.
Submit the application online before midnight on 11 August 2026.
Offline application forms and documents submitted in any other mode will not be accepted.
important_instructions: Only online applications submitted through the departmental website within the prescribed time will be accepted; offline forms and documents will not be valid under any circumstances. For more information, candidates may contact the concerned Child Development Project Officer office (at the Vikas Khand level) or the District Programme Officer office, Unnao (at Vikas Bhawan), during office hours. If any error, fact, figure, or educational record is found to be incorrect or fabricated, the candidature will be rejected. Only income certificates issued by a competent authority as per the applicable Uttar Pradesh Government Revenue Department order (verifiable online) will be valid. The prescribed income limit for Below Poverty Line (BPL) status for rural and urban areas will be applied as per the applicable Social Welfare Department government order. Only residence and caste certificates issued with online digital signature from the Tehsil (verifiable online) will be valid. The number of vacant posts published in the notification may increase or decrease due to special circumstances.

Candidates interested in women-only government job openings can also explore more Anganwadi Recruitment and ICDS Jobs notifications, as well as other Uttar Pradesh Government Jobs and Unnao District Jobs currently open for application.

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Notification Out
content_sections.text: The notice (Ref. No. C-719, dated 21 July 2026) has been issued by the District Programme Officer, Unnao. Complete village/Anganwadi-centre-wise vacancy, reservation, and eligibility details have been displayed at the notice boards of the Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, Vikas Khand, and Child Development Project Officer offices across the district, and are also available on the departmental website. Notification: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Apply Online / Official Website: Check Here

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview

Respective Gram Sabha/Ward, Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh (project-wise)
Merit (Intermediate/Graduation/Post-Graduation marks) and category-wise priority order

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Vacancy 2026 Details
content_sections.text: A total of 336 vacant posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri have been notified across 17 Child Development Projects in Unnao district, category-wise as follows: The number of vacant posts published in the notification may increase or decrease due to special circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: Based on marks obtained in Intermediate, Graduation, and Post-Graduation
Must be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward (urban area) as the vacant post applied for

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years; Maximum age: 35 years (as on cut-off date 1 July 2026) Only the date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit will be determined based on marks obtained in Intermediate, Graduation, and Post-Graduation. Within eligible candidates from the same Gram Sabha/Ward, priority for selection will follow this order: Widow BPL candidate Divorced/deserted BPL candidate BPL candidate Widow APL candidate Divorced/deserted APL candidate APL candidate For divorced/deserted candidates, a legal order issued by a competent court will be valid. For widow candidates, only a certified copy of the death certificate and family register issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned municipal body will be valid.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Application
content_sections.text: Self-attested, clean and legible copies of educational mark sheets/certificates (Intermediate, Graduation, Post-Graduation as applicable) Residence certificate issued with online digital signature from the Tehsil (verifiable online) Caste certificate issued with online digital signature from the Tehsil (verifiable online), where applicable Income certificate issued by a competent authority, verifiable online, as per the prescribed government order For divorced/deserted candidates: legal order from a competent court For widow candidates: certified copy of death certificate and family register

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Ensure you fulfil the eligibility criteria for gender, age, qualification, and residence before applying. Visit the departmental website: http://upanganwadibharti.in Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and residence details for the relevant Gram Sabha/Ward vacancy. Upload self-attested, clean and legible copies of the required documents as mentioned in the application. Review all details carefully before submission. Submit the application online before midnight on 11 August 2026. Offline application forms and documents submitted in any other mode will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only online applications submitted through the departmental website within the prescribed time will be accepted; offline forms and documents will not be valid under any circumstances. For more information, candidates may contact the concerned Child Development Project Officer office (at the Vikas Khand level) or the District Programme Officer office, Unnao (at Vikas Bhawan), during office hours. If any error, fact, figure, or educational record is found to be incorrect or fabricated, the candidature will be rejected. Only income certificates issued by a competent authority as per the applicable Uttar Pradesh Government Revenue Department order (verifiable online) will be valid. The prescribed income limit for Below Poverty Line (BPL) status for rural and urban areas will be applied as per the applicable Social Welfare Department government order. Only residence and caste certificates issued with online digital signature from the Tehsil (verifiable online) will be valid. The number of vacant posts published in the notification may increase or decrease due to special circumstances. Candidates interested in women-only government job openings can also explore more Anganwadi Recruitment and ICDS Jobs notifications, as well as other Uttar Pradesh Government Jobs and Unnao District Jobs currently open for application.

faq.question: Q1. How many Anganwadi Karyakartri vacancies have been announced in Unnao district for 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 336 vacant posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri have been notified across 17 Child Development Projects in Unnao district.

faq.question: Q2. Who is eligible to apply for the Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only female candidates who are permanent residents of the same Gram Sabha/Ward as the vacant post, with a minimum qualification of Intermediate or equivalent, are eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications will be accepted until midnight on 11 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not less than 18 years and not more than 35 years of age as on the cut-off date of 1 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Anganwadi Karyakartri posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on merit from Intermediate, Graduation, and Post-Graduation marks, followed by a category-wise priority order among BPL/APL, widow, and divorced/deserted candidates from the same Gram Sabha/Ward.

faq.question: Q6. Can a candidate apply for a vacancy outside her own Gram Sabha/Ward?
faq.answer: No, the notification requires the applicant to be a permanent resident of the same Gram Sabha/Ward (or urban ward) as the vacant post applied for.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri application?
faq.answer: Self-attested educational certificates, an online-verifiable residence certificate, caste certificate (where applicable), income certificate, and, where relevant, court orders or death/family register certificates.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for Unnao Anganwadi Karyakartri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the departmental website, http://upanganwadibharti.in; offline forms are not accepted.
